name: Aaron Marketing Skills
description: 120 marketing skills and 8 commands as a four-layer operating system: Narrative strategy; SEO/GEO, Organic Social, Email, Paid Ads, and Influencer channels; Product Launch orchestration; and a Protocol layer with seven append-only truth registries plus non-canonical working memory. Eight typed advisory frameworks (TALE, CORE-EEAT, CITE, C3, ECHO, SEND, ROAS, RAMP) use machine-checkable auditor artifacts and immutable standalone runtime contracts. Keyless-first and zero-dependency.
